prospective_ai_cards.title: Productivity creates demand
prospective_ai_cards.body: AI-assisted productivity lowers software costs, expanding the market and boosting demand for the very developers who build AI tools - a virtuous cycle for computing graduates.

prospective_ai_cards.title: Data & AI: fastest-growing segment
prospective_ai_cards.body: Data science, ML, and database roles are Florida's fastest-growing tech category at 5.6% annually - 3.6x the national benchmark. Directly aligned with Bellini programs.

current_resources_cards.title: Schedule with your advisor
current_resources_cards.body: 1:1 sessions for resume review, interview prep, and job search strategy. Drop-in hours Tues & Thurs.

current_resources_cards.title: Bellini career portal
current_resources_cards.body: Curated postings from employer partners, updated weekly. Internships, co-ops, and full-time roles.

current_resources_cards.title: Salary benchmarks
current_resources_cards.body: FL median tech wage is $102,908 - 122% above state median. Breakdowns by role and experience level.

current_resources_cards.title: AI-specific opportunities
current_resources_cards.body: 12,735 Florida postings require AI skills. Track the live trend via AIMaps (UMD & LinkUp).

current_resources_cards.title: Alumni connections
current_resources_cards.body: Connect with Bellini alumni in tech, cybersecurity, and AI through our LinkedIn community and mentorship program.

current_resources_cards.title: Industry certifications
current_resources_cards.body: CompTIA Security+, AWS, Google Cloud - credentials employers actively request in postings.

employer_value_cards.title: Programs aligned to market demand
employer_value_cards.body: BS CS, MS AI, MS Data Intelligence, MS Cybersecurity, and MS Computer Engineering - mapped to fastest-growing occupation categories in Florida and nationally.

employer_value_cards.title: Curriculum built for the AI era
employer_value_cards.body: Graduates trained in ML, deep learning, NLP, and applied AI systems - directly addressing 12,735 Florida postings requiring AI skills identified in 2024.

employer_value_cards.title: One of Florida's largest computing colleges
employer_value_cards.body: 68+ faculty across AI, cybersecurity, CS, and computer engineering. USF is Florida's fastest-growing research university.

employer_value_cards.title: Tampa Bay - a rising tech market
employer_value_cards.body: Florida is #4 nationally in net tech employment and #3 for projected 2025 job gains. Tampa Bay between two of fastest-growing tech metros in state.

employer_recruiting_cards.title: On-campus recruiting
employer_recruiting_cards.body: Info sessions, tech talks, and interview suites. Spring and fall career fairs with targeted computing tracks.

employer_recruiting_cards.title: Internship partnerships
employer_recruiting_cards.body: Post internship and co-op positions directly to Bellini students via our career portal.

employer_recruiting_cards.title: Capstone sponsorship
employer_recruiting_cards.body: Sponsor a senior or graduate capstone. Your real-world problem, our students' solutions - with faculty oversight.
